Professional Summary
Dr. MMMMMM Sadeghi-Niaraki is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at the XR Research Center, MMMMMM University, Republic of Korea.

Research Projects Experiences
Testtttt Research Project on Urban Mobility
Funding: MMMMMM Research Institute
Duration: 2024 - Present
Development of AI-based solutions for smart city planning.

Awards & Honors
TEST Award 2024
From MMMMMM International Conference
For outstanding research in Geo-AI and spatial computing.

Summary of Qualifications
MMMMMM years of academic experience in Computer Science
Led major research projects totaling over $9.3M in funding
Published 200+ peer-reviewed papers
Secured 22+ patents in spatial analysis technologies
